_meta.method: Web-verified by research agent (existence checked per gym; closed businesses pruned: Powerhouse Downtown, CrossFit Ybor, Vertical Ventures Tampa, YouFit Hillsborough, 9Round x2, Metroflex Brandon, Sweathouz, Sweat440). Prices intentionally null where not published - never fabricated.
_meta.normalization: Segments/neighborhoods/amenity keys are normalized by scripts/seed.mjs

gyms.name: Powerhouse Gym Athletic Club
gyms.price_note: Free first-time guest pass with local ID
gyms.description: 50,000 sq ft old-school bodybuilding and strength gym on W Hillsborough Ave, one of Tampa's longest-running serious-training spots. Heavy iron and a hardcore-but-welcoming crowd, with late weekday hours.

gyms.name: Powerhouse Gym North Tampa
gyms.address: 13539 N Florida Ave, Ste 8, Tampa, FL 33613
gyms.hours_note: 24/7 member access; staffed hours shorter (approx 8am-8pm weekdays)
gyms.description: No-frills 11,000 sq ft 24/7 strength and bodybuilding gym near Fletcher Ave, operating since 1983. Iron-focused training for the North Tampa/USF crowd.

gyms.name: 813 Barbell
gyms.description: Dedicated powerlifting/powerbuilding gym in West Tampa (Armenia Ave, just west of Seminole Heights) with competition-spec gear including a monolift, reverse hyper and competition benches; hosts sanctioned meets.

gyms.name: CrossFit Jaguar
gyms.description: Long-running registered CrossFit affiliate in the Carrollwood/Northdale area with coached group WODs, lifting platforms and a tight member community.

gyms.name: Seminole Heights CrossFit
gyms.description: Neighborhood CrossFit box (the SHAC, Seminole Heights Athletic Center) on N Florida Ave offering coached classes and individualized programming.

gyms.name: Cigar City CrossFit
gyms.description: Ybor City CrossFit affiliate founded in 2016, known for expert-led group classes, individualized programming and a spacious warehouse facility.

gyms.name: Dale Mabry CrossFit
gyms.description: Small South Tampa CrossFit box sharing a building with Kodawari Studios on Henderson Blvd; classic coached WODs in a tight-knit setting.

gyms.name: Westshore CrossFit
gyms.address: 317 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33609
gyms.hours_note: Mon-Fri from 5:30am to evening, Sat 9am-1pm, closed Sun
gyms.description: CrossFit affiliate on N Dale Mabry serving the Westshore business district, with early-morning and evening coached classes.

gyms.name: Crunch Fitness - Carrollwood
gyms.address: 15798 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
gyms.description: Full-service big-box gym with Crunch's signature group classes and a large strength floor. Popular value option on the Carrollwood corridor.

gyms.name: Crunch Fitness - South Tampa
gyms.address: 4055 S Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33611
gyms.description: Big-box Crunch on S Dale Mabry near Gandy with group fitness, large cardio/strength floors and budget-friendly memberships.

gyms.name: EoS Fitness Tampa Midtown
gyms.address: 2525 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33607
gyms.description: High-value 24/7 big-box near Midtown Tampa with a serious free-weight selection, turf functional area and group classes.

gyms.name: LA Fitness - Tampa S Dale Mabry (Signature)
gyms.address: 301 S Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33609
gyms.price_note: Free guest pass available via website
gyms.description: Signature-tier LA Fitness with pool, basketball court and full strength/cardio floors - the classic everything-under-one-roof big box for central South Tampa.

gyms.name: Planet Fitness - Tampa (Fowler Ave)
gyms.price_note: Low-cost memberships; Black Card members can bring a guest free
gyms.description: Budget 24-hour gym near USF with the standard judgment-free, cardio-heavy Planet Fitness setup; no barbell squat racks and dumbbells top out around 75 lbs.

gyms.name: Anytime Fitness - Carrollwood
gyms.address: 11113 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
gyms.description: Compact 24/7 key-fob access club on N Dale Mabry - convenient any-hour training with coaching and standard strength/cardio equipment.

gyms.name: Life Time Harbour Island
gyms.address: 900 S Harbour Island Blvd, Tampa, FL 33602
gyms.price_note: Luxury athletic-country-club pricing; tours via membership team
gyms.description: Luxury athletic country club that transformed the former Harbour Island Athletic Club in 2024 - 6.5 acres with resort pools, tennis/pickleball and a full training floor minutes from downtown.

gyms.name: Orangetheory Fitness - Water Street Tampa
gyms.price_note: First class free for new local members
gyms.description: Heart-rate-zone interval training studio in the Water Street/Channel District - treadmills, rowers and weight floor in coach-led classes.

gyms.name: Orangetheory Fitness - South Tampa
gyms.address: 115 S Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33609
gyms.price_note: First class free for new local members
gyms.description: Busy South Tampa outpost of the heart-rate-based interval franchise, on S Dale Mabry just south of Kennedy.

gyms.name: F45 Training Sparkman Tampa
gyms.description: Functional HIIT team-training studio at Sparkman Wharf with 45-minute coached circuit classes; walkable from the Channel District and Water Street.

gyms.name: 9Round Fitness - Tampa Henderson Blvd
gyms.description: Kickboxing circuit studio - nine 3-minute stations with trainer guidance and no fixed class times. The remaining 9Round in Tampa city proper after other locations closed.

gyms.name: MADabolic Ybor City
gyms.price_note: Free intro week promotions have been offered
gyms.description: Strength-driven interval training franchise in Ybor City built around structured work:rest programming - a harder-edged alternative to typical HIIT studios.

gyms.name: CAMP Tampa
gyms.description: South Tampa boutique fitness campus with five studios (Stations, Circuit, Sculpt, Pilates, Yoga) running 250+ classes a week, plus onsite childcare and showers.

gyms.name: Bayshore Fit
gyms.price_note: Day passes available; membership capped around 1,000 members
gyms.description: Upscale limited-membership gym (formerly Bayshore CrossFit) on Gandy Blvd combining open-gym strength training, 35+ weekly classes, outdoor turf and a recovery suite with infrared sauna and cold plunge.

gyms.name: Central Rock Gym - Tampa
gyms.address: 4479 W Gandy Blvd B, Tampa, FL 33611
gyms.price_note: Day passes available; see day-use pricing page
gyms.description: Bouldering-focused climbing gym with auto-belays, a weight/fitness room and weekly yoga - Tampa's main climbing option since Vertical Ventures Tampa closed in 2020.

gyms.name: Central Rock Gym - Citrus Park
gyms.description: 16,000 sq ft bouldering gym with about 8,000 sq ft of climbing terrain plus fitness and yoga space, serving northwest Tampa (Citrus Park/Carrollwood).

gyms.name: Bella Prana Yoga & Meditation
gyms.description: One of Tampa's best-known yoga and meditation studios (now Bella Prana Wellness Collective), in the Hyde Park area on W Platt St; broad schedule from gentle to heated vinyasa.

gyms.name: Kodawari Studios
gyms.address: 3965 Henderson Blvd, Ste C, Tampa, FL 33629
gyms.description: Artsy South Tampa yoga studio with heated classes plus an on-site sauna and cold plunge - a yoga-meets-recovery hybrid on Henderson Blvd.

gyms.name: Club Pilates South Tampa
gyms.description: Reformer Pilates franchise studio on S Howard Ave in SoHo with tiered class levels throughout the day.

gyms.name: [solidcore] Hyde Park
gyms.description: High-intensity, low-impact Megaformer studio in Hyde Park Village - 50-minute slow-twitch burnout classes with a cult following.

gyms.name: Tampa Muay Thai
gyms.description: Authentic Muay Thai and Brazilian jiu-jitsu gym east of Ybor with adult and kids programs, an invite-only fight team and strength & conditioning.

gyms.name: Gracie Tampa South MMA
gyms.description: Brazilian jiu-jitsu and MMA academy in North Hyde Park just west of downtown, part of the long-running Gracie Tampa lineage.

gyms.name: Perspire Sauna Studio - South Tampa
gyms.address: 1155 S Dale Mabry Hwy, Ste 16/17, Tampa, FL 33629
gyms.price_note: Single sessions and memberships; intro offers vary
gyms.description: Private infrared sauna suites with integrated red light therapy - booked recovery sessions rather than a workout gym.

gyms.name: Restore Hyper Wellness - Carrollwood
gyms.address: 13158 N Dale Mabry Hwy, Tampa, FL 33618
gyms.price_note: Services priced a la carte or by membership
gyms.description: Recovery and wellness franchise offering whole-body cryotherapy, infrared sauna, compression, red light and IV drips on the N Dale Mabry retail corridor.
